function.message: I could not fully complete the inbox request without guessing, so I did not mutate the workspace. The likely workflow product is Northstar Ledger, whose canonical project folder is dated 2026_04_01, but I could not verify that the basement renovation started earlier because the only basement-renovation reference is a parking-lot note that explicitly says those items are not scheduled or in the active project lane. I also did not delete any project because 'the earliest project' is ambiguous: multiple project folders share the earliest visible date prefix 2026_04_01.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap rules, read 99_system workflow before task work, treated inbox as a request rather than canonical truth, and did not mutate the workspace because the request lacked canonical support and the deletion target was ambiguous.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the request cannot be completed from available evidence without guessing. 40_projects/2026_04_01_northstar_ledger/README.MD supports Northstar Ledger as the workflow product, but 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md says the basement renovation is not scheduled and does not belong in the active project lane, so there is no start date to compare. The root tree also showed several project folders with the same earliest date prefix 2026_04_01, so 'delete the earliest project' is not uniquely identifiable.
